hero.tagline: One platform for scheduling, dispatch, time tracking, and quality assurance
hero.bannerTitle: Cleaning • Landscaping • Snow Removal • Facility Management • Municipal Services
hero.metaDescription: SaberTask is the all-in-one field service management platform for service businesses. Schedule tasks, manage teams, track time, and ensure quality.

meta.title: SaberTask - Field Service Management for Service Businesses
meta.description: All-in-one field service platform: scheduling, time tracking, quality reports, invoicing and mobile app - built for cleaning, landscaping and facility teams.

features.subtitle: From automated scheduling to invoicing - SaberTask replaces fragmented tools and gives you full control over your field operations.

liveDashboard.title: Live Dashboard
liveDashboard.description: Get real-time visibility into your operations. See worker locations, task progress, and team utilisation on a live map - powered by instant updates.
painPoints: No real-time visibility into field operations.
Managers rely on phone calls to check on progress.
Impossible to react quickly to delays or issues.
solutions: Live map showing worker locations and task status.
Instant updates when workers check in or complete tasks.
Real-time KPIs: tasks completed, in progress, and overdue.

subcontractorManagement.title: Employee Management
subcontractorManagement.description: Organise your workforce into colour-coded teams. Assign tasks, balance workloads, and manage piecework payment splits - all from one place.
painPoints: Difficult to balance workloads across teams.
No clear overview of who is assigned where.
Payment calculations for piecework are manual and error-prone.
solutions: Colour-coded teams with easy drag-and-drop assignment.
Percentage-based piecework splits calculated automatically.
Swap staff instantly when someone is unavailable.

automaticInvoicing.title: Invoicing & Billing
automaticInvoicing.description: Export completed task and time data for accurate invoicing. Supports OIOXML for Danish public-sector billing, plus CSV and Excel for any accounting system.
painPoints: Creating invoices manually is time-consuming and error-prone.
Completed jobs slip through without being billed.
Difficult to prove services were performed.
solutions: Export verified task data with timestamps and GPS proof.
OIOXML export for Danish public-sector invoicing (e-Faktura).
CSV/Excel exports ready for your accounting or ERP system.

mobileApp.title: Mobile App
mobileApp.description: Give your field workers a fast, reliable app for iOS and Android. One-tap clock in, task details, photo capture, and offline support - built for outdoor use.
painPoints: Field workers rely on paper or memory to track work.
No easy way to communicate schedule changes.
Difficult to capture proof of completed work.
solutions: Focused daily task list with swipe actions for quick check-in.
Offline support - tasks sync automatically when back online.
Integrated camera for before-and-after photo documentation.

customerDashboard.title: Customer Portal
customerDashboard.description: Give your clients direct visibility into the services they receive. A secure, branded portal for viewing tasks, service history, photos, and reports.
painPoints: Clients call constantly asking for service updates.
No professional way to share documentation and reports.
Difficult for clients to verify work was completed.
solutions: Self-service portal where clients see task status and history.
Access to photo documentation and service reports.
Clients can submit requests and provide feedback.

smartRouteBuilder.title: Automated Task Scheduling
smartRouteBuilder.description: Define recurring Service Agreements and let SaberTask generate work orders automatically - weekly, biweekly, monthly, seasonal, or any custom pattern.
painPoints: Scheduling recurring tasks manually wastes hours every week.
Tasks get missed or duplicated without a system.
Seasonal work requires constant schedule adjustments.
solutions: Service Agreements auto-generate tasks up to 12 months ahead.
Seasonal support limits tasks to specific months automatically.
Planning view shows the full week at a glance by team.

drawingTool.title: Quality Controls
drawingTool.description: Ensure consistent service quality with photo documentation, completion notes, and configurable checklists that workers must complete before finishing a task.
painPoints: No way to verify that work meets standards.
Quality issues only surface when clients complain.
Inconsistent service across different teams and workers.
solutions: Before-and-after photo documentation for every task.
Configurable checklists tailored per service type.
Inspection scheduling and customer feedback collection.

customerManagement.title: Customer Management
customerManagement.description: The structured backbone of your service business - every customer, location, contact, contract and document in one searchable database, all linked to the work that runs the day.
painPoints: Customer data scattered across spreadsheets, email and folders.
No single source of truth for locations, contacts and contracts.
Files lost on shared drives with no full-text search.
solutions: Customers, locations and contacts in one structured database.
Work descriptions and service agreements drive recurring tasks.
AI-searchable file vault - even photos and PDFs become text.

mobileApp.title: Your entire operation in your pocket
mobileApp.description: The SaberTask mobile app delivers native performance on iOS and Android. Built for field workers who need a fast, reliable interface outdoors and on the move.

gpsTracking.title: GPS Clock In/Out
gpsTracking.description: One-tap check-in with automatic GPS capture and break management.

revenueOverview.title: Personal Stats
revenueOverview.description: Track tasks completed, average time per job, and piecework earnings.

photoCapture.title: Photo Documentation
photoCapture.description: Capture before-and-after photos attached directly to each task.

taskManagement.title: Daily Task List
taskManagement.description: View assignments, special instructions, and customer details at a glance.

benefits.title: Why Choose SaberTask?
benefits.subtitle: Purpose-built for service businesses of all sizes

efficiency.title: Save Time & Money
efficiency.description: Automated scheduling and streamlined workflows mean less admin, fewer errors, and more jobs completed per day.

satisfaction.title: Happier Customers
satisfaction.description: Photo documentation, real-time updates, and a self-service portal keep your clients informed and confident.

growth.title: Scale Your Business
growth.description: From 10 field workers to 5,000+ - SaberTask grows with you without adding administrative overhead.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your team - no hidden fees.
pricing.metaDescription: SaberTask pricing for service businesses of all sizes. Transparent per-user plans, no hidden fees, 30-day free trial - scale from 2 to 200+ employees.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Large organizations with advanced needs and complex integrations
features: Custom integrations (e.g., NAV, ServiceNow, other enterprise systems)

testimonials.title: Built by people who know the industry
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by service companies across industries

featured.quote: After 20 years in service management, we were frustrated by using 7+ different tools that didn't talk to each other. SaberTask was built to solve that - one platform for scheduling, dispatch, time tracking, and quality assurance.
featured.author: Sebastian & Martin

items.quote: SaberTask has completely transformed how we operate. We're now handling 40% more clients with the same team size.
items.author: Michael Jensen

items.quote: The automated scheduling alone has saved us countless hours. We know exactly what needs to happen and when.
items.author: Sarah Andersen

items.quote: Our customers love the portal and photo documentation. It's elevated our professionalism to a whole new level.
items.author: Thomas Nielsen

items.quote: The invoicing exports make billing a breeze. What used to take hours now takes minutes.
items.author: Emma Larsen

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Got questions? We've got answers.
faq.metaDescription: Common questions about SaberTask answered. Learn about our free trial, plans, data security, training, support and how we fit your service business.

items.question: How does the free trial work?
items.answer: You get 30 days of full access to SaberTask with no credit card required. Everything is included - web dashboard, mobile app, all user types. At the end of the trial you simply continue with a paid subscription or your account is deactivated.

items.question: How does pricing work?
items.answer: There are no separate plans or tiers. You pay per user per month based on their role: Worker, Worker with planning, or Admin. You only pay for the users you have - add or remove users at any time and your bill adjusts automatically.

items.question: Is there a minimum contract period?
items.answer: No. SaberTask is billed monthly with no lock-in. You can cancel at any time and you will not be charged for the following month.

items.question: What is included for each user type?
items.answer: Workers get the mobile app with clock in/out, task list, photos, messaging and live salary. Workers with planning can additionally create tasks, plan the day and do quality reporting. Admins get full web dashboard access including employee management, customer management, route planning, invoicing and payroll.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Yes. We use bank-level encryption and are fully GDPR compliant. Your data is backed up daily and stored securely in European data centers. All access is role-based and tenant-isolated.

items.question: Do you offer onboarding and training?
items.answer: Every new customer gets a personal onboarding session where we help set up your account, import data and train your team. We also offer ongoing support via email and phone.

items.question: Can I integrate SaberTask with my accounting system?
items.answer: Yes. SaberTask supports CSV and Excel exports for any accounting system, plus direct integration with Dinero, e-conomic, Microsoft Dynamics NAV and QuickBooks.

items.question: Does the mobile app work on both iOS and Android?
items.answer: Yes. The SaberTask mobile app is available on both the App Store and Google Play. It is built natively for fast performance and works reliably in the field.

about.title: About SaberTask
about.subtitle: We're on a mission to make field service operations more efficient and professional.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: SaberTask was born from firsthand experience in the field service industry. Our founders spent years managing service operations and saw the challenges that come with coordinating crews, scheduling tasks, and keeping customers informed. We built SaberTask to solve these problems with modern technology that's actually easy to use.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To empower service businesses with the tools they need to run more efficient, profitable, and professional operations.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.description: Technology should make your life easier, not harder.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: When your clients depend on you, you can count on us.

partnership.title: Partnership

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: At SaberTask, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our service.
privacyPolicy.metaDescription: How SaberTask collects, uses and protects your data. Fully GDPR compliant with bank-level encryption and multi-tenant data isolation.

dataCollection.title: Information We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, use our services, or contact us for support. This may include your name, email address, company name, phone number, and payment information. We also automatically collect certain information when you use our services, including device information, IP address, and usage data.

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, process transactions, send you technical notices and support messages, and respond to your comments and questions. We may also use your information to send you promotional communications, though you can opt out at any time.

dataSharing.title: Information Sharing
dataSharing.content: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information with service providers who assist us in operating our platform, conducting our business, or serving our users. We may also share information when required by law or to protect our rights.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our service and hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data that are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent.

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information. We use bank-level encryption and are fully GDPR compliant. Your data is backed up daily and stored securely in European data centers. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also have the right to restrict or object to certain processing of your data. To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information below. If you are in the European Economic Area, you have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

dataDeletion.title: Data Deletion Requests
dataDeletion.appInfo: The SaberTask app is published by SaberTask LDA (VAT PT518467546). You can ask us to delete your account and associated data at any time by following the steps below.
dataDeletion.step1: In the app: open Settings > Account > Delete account. This immediately starts the deletion process.
dataDeletion.step2: By email: send a request to <email>sebastian@sabertask.com</email> from the email address registered on your account, using the subject line "Data Deletion Request". We confirm receipt within 5 business days and complete deletion within 30 days.
dataDeletion.deletedContent: Account profile (name, email, phone, company), login credentials, user-generated content (tasks, projects, checklists, files, photos, comments, messages), device identifiers, IP addresses and usage logs.
dataDeletion.retainedTitle: Data we retain and for how long
dataDeletion.retainedContent: Invoices and accounting records are retained for 10 years as required by Portuguese tax law (Decreto-Lei n.º 28/2019). Encrypted backups are rotated and permanently purged within 90 days of the deletion request.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at <email>sebastian@sabertask.com</email>.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: These terms and conditions ("Terms") apply as the contractual relationship between the customer ("Customer") and SaberTask LDA, VAT number: PT518467546 ("SaberTask").
terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions for using SaberTask. Service agreements, pricing, data security, operations, liability and your rights as a customer.
terms.companyInfo: SaberTask LDA, VAT number: PT518467546, Rua das Violetas n 145, Cascais, Lisboa, Portugal

service.title: The Service
service.content:
SaberTask provides software via its website, mobile platforms, or similar ("Software") that enables the Customer to manage and optimize field service operations through self-service. The Customer can manage customers, addresses, subcontractors, and routes (collectively referred to as "the Service").

The scope of the Service is defined based on the Customer's choice of service package, which may contain more or fewer features ("Service Package"). The choice is made in collaboration with SaberTask and will appear on the agreement letter.

Through the business relationship between the Customer and SaberTask, the Customer gains non-exclusive access to use the Software. The Customer does not own the Software or the Services or any copy or part thereof.

Access to use the Service, including the Software, may only be used for the Customer's purposes and applies exclusively to the Customer and their subcontractors. Both the Customer and their subcontractors must have their own unique username and password. It is the Customer's duty to ensure adequate security to protect usernames and passwords to prevent misuse of the Service.

acceptance.title: Acceptance and Permission
acceptance.content:
By registering on SaberTask's platform, the Customer accepts these Terms as the applicable contractual relationship. The Terms also apply to third parties who may perform work on behalf of the Customer in relation to the Service.

The Service is provided to the Customer in their capacity as a business operator, including even if the Customer's employees gain access to all or parts of the Software.

The Customer consents to SaberTask and its third parties conducting marketing towards the Customer and Subcontractors. The Customer may withdraw such consent in writing.

The Customer accepts SaberTask's other policies, including the personal data and Cookie policy, available in the current version on SaberTask's website. These policies are considered an integral part of these Terms.

thirdParties.title: Third Parties
thirdParties.content:
To deliver the Service and any additional services, SaberTask may use suppliers and similar business partners ("Third Parties"). The Customer accepts that information uploaded in connection with the Service may be processed by and exchanged with Third Parties working with SaberTask, provided that SaberTask has entered into a data processing agreement with the relevant Third Parties.

If Third Parties offer additional services via SaberTask's API, the use of these services is subject to the relevant Third Party's terms. The Customer exempts SaberTask from any liability in connection with the use of such Third Party services.

customerResponsibilities.title: Customer's Duties and Responsibilities
customerResponsibilities.content:
The Customer, including their Subcontractors, is solely responsible for the accuracy and quality of information registered and used in the Software. The Customer must independently ensure that the information is registered correctly and kept up to date at all times.

Access to personal information, for example by entering personal identification numbers, may be punishable and subject to compensation. It is the Customer's responsibility to ensure that the Customer and their employees do not gain unauthorized access to personal information. Violation of this may result in immediate termination of the agreement.

The Customer must not give others access to the Service, including the Software, without that person having a direct agreement with SaberTask.

It is the Customer's responsibility that the Service is not used in a manner that violates relevant legislation or other regulation, or that damages SaberTask's name, reputation, or goodwill. Violation may result in immediate termination of the agreement.

By accepting these Terms, the Customer confirms that they are not in competition with SaberTask. All software, design, architecture, text, and similar are protected by copyright.

pricing.title: Price and Payment Terms
pricing.content:
The price depends on the Customer's choice of Service Package and any additional services. Prices are stated exclusive of VAT and can be found in the agreement letter.

SaberTask may change prices with one month's notice. Changes in exchange rates, taxes, insurance, net price index, and costs to Third Parties mean that SaberTask may adjust prices. The Customer will be notified via the website or email. If the Customer does not agree to a price change, the Customer may terminate the agreement immediately, though the Customer must still pay for actual use of the Service until termination.

After each month of platform use, the Service will automatically generate an invoice to the Customer. The invoiced amount will be paid through the registered payment solution recognized by SaberTask.

The season fee is invoiced once annually on November 1st for all active locations. For locations started after season start, the season fee is invoiced as soon as possible after addition, calculated proportionally based on remaining season time. All season fees are binding for the selected period and are not refunded upon mid-season cancellation.

If the Customer does not pay on time, SaberTask may initiate a reminder procedure. Continued non-payment may result in access to the Service being blocked.

For late payment, interest of 2.75% per month is added from the due date until payment is made.

dataAndSecurity.title: Information and Security
dataAndSecurity.content:
Information registered in the Service is the Customer's property. The Customer may request the registered information in an electronic format chosen by SaberTask. Upon termination, the Customer will have access to the information for six months, after which SaberTask may permanently delete the information.

SaberTask has taken necessary security measures against information being illegally or accidentally degraded, lost, or destroyed, and against information being misused, coming to the knowledge of unauthorized persons, or being processed in violation of personal data legislation.

When using the Service, where the Customer uses information, usernames, or passwords originating from third parties, the Customer warrants that disclosure of such information and SaberTask's data processing does not infringe rights or agreements with third parties. The Customer indemnifies SaberTask for any loss as a result of this provision.

changes.title: Changes and Transfer
changes.content:
SaberTask may make changes to the Service and additional services. SaberTask is also entitled to change the form and structure of the Service. Any change may be made with or without notice.

These Terms may be changed by SaberTask at any time without notice to the Customer, as long as the Customer is informed in writing of changes. The Terms are available on SaberTask's website. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance.

Rights and obligations granted to SaberTask under these Terms may be transferred in whole or in part to affiliated companies or third parties.

The Customer has no right to transfer rights and obligations or access to the Service to third parties, either in whole or in part.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property Rights
intellectualProperty.content:
With the exception of the Customer's information registered in the system, the Software and the information generated by the Software are protected by copyright and other intellectual property rights and belong to or are licensed to SaberTask. Through the Service, the Customer receives only a right of use.

In case of any suspected or actual infringement of SaberTask's intellectual property rights or unauthorized use of the Service, the Customer must notify SaberTask.

The information registered by the Customer and their Subcontractors belongs to the Customer and/or their Subcontractors.

liability.title: SaberTask's Liability and Confidentiality
liability.content:
The Service is provided by SaberTask in its current state. SaberTask disclaims any warranty, assurance, guarantee, or other terms beyond what is stated in these Terms.

In connection with the Customer's use of the Service, SaberTask disclaims any liability for loss that the Customer may incur, regardless of whether such loss arises in or outside of contract, whether consequential damages or other indirect losses, operating losses, product liability losses, information losses, or other losses due to simple negligence.

The Customer has a duty to notify SaberTask of errors in the Service. SaberTask is only obligated to correct errors that the Customer or SaberTask has become aware of.

The Customer accepts that regardless of what loss or basis for liability the Customer has suffered, SaberTask's total liability may not exceed an amount corresponding to the previous 12 months' invoiced amount, but no more than DKK 50,000.

SaberTask and its employees have a duty of confidentiality regarding all information that can be attributed directly to the Customer.

operations.title: Operations and Force Majeure
operations.content:
SaberTask aims for high operational stability and will restore normal operations as quickly as possible in case of downtime or operational disruptions. Maintenance and upgrades will, as far as possible, be scheduled between 15:00-22:00 CET and will be announced in advance.

SaberTask is not liable for losses arising from downtime or operational disruptions. Even in areas where stricter liability applies, SaberTask is not liable for losses caused by:

- Damage to data or lack of access to or downtime in IT systems
- Power supply or telecommunications failures, natural disasters, war, riots, pandemics, civil unrest, legislation or administrative acts, sabotage, terror, or vandalism (including computer viruses and hacking)
- Conflicts such as strikes, lockouts, boycotts, or blockades
- Other circumstances beyond SaberTask's control

termination.title: Termination of Services
termination.content:
Upon registration for the Service, the Customer accepts these Terms. The Terms run until termination of the agreement in accordance with these conditions. The agreement may be terminated without notice or fee, but all unpaid fees will be collected in one invoice and sent to the Customer upon termination.

Termination of the season fee must be made in writing no later than October 31st to avoid charging the address fee for the coming season. In case of failure to terminate on time, the Customer undertakes to pay the address fee for the coming season.

SaberTask may terminate the agreement with 3 months' notice, or without notice in case of the Customer's material breach of these Terms or the Customer's bankruptcy or insolvency.

To terminate the agreement, the Customer must send an email to sebastian@sabertask.com or contact their assigned contact person at SaberTask.

disputes.title: Disputes
disputes.content: These Terms shall be read, interpreted, and supplemented in accordance with Danish law. Any dispute arising from these Terms and the resulting legal relationship between the Customer and SaberTask shall be brought before the Copenhagen City Court.

meta.title: Live Dashboard - Real-time Field Operations | SaberTask
meta.description: Track worker locations, task progress and team utilisation on a live map. Real-time visibility into field operations across every team and location.

hero.description: See every worker, every task, and every update the moment it happens. The Live Dashboard gives managers and dispatchers a real-time command centre for field operations.

problem.title: The Problem with Blind Operations
problem.description: Most service businesses have no idea what's happening in the field until the end of the day. That changes with SaberTask.
before: Calling workers to check if they've arrived on site
No idea which tasks are delayed or overdue
Finding out about problems hours after they happen
Guessing at team utilisation and capacity
after: See every worker's location on a live map
Instant status updates as tasks progress
React to issues the moment they arise
Real-time KPIs and utilisation metrics at a glance

capabilities.title: Everything You See, In Real Time
capabilities.description: The Live Dashboard is powered by SignalR for instant updates - no refreshing, no polling, no delays.

workerTracking.title: Worker Location Tracking
workerTracking.description: See where every field worker is right now on an interactive map. Know who is on site, who is in transit, and where gaps are forming.

taskProgress.title: Live Task Progress
taskProgress.description: Watch tasks move through their lifecycle - from scheduled to in-progress to completed - without lifting a finger.

instantAlerts.title: Instant Notifications
instantAlerts.description: Get notified immediately when an employee marks themselves as sick or creates a new task.

kpiMetrics.title: Real-Time KPIs
kpiMetrics.description: Tasks completed today, tasks in progress, tasks overdue, and on-time completion rates - all updating live.

teamUtilisation.title: Team Utilisation
teamUtilisation.description: See how your teams are performing across all active jobs. Spot underutilised crews and balance workloads on the fly.

redeployment.title: Fast Redeployment
redeployment.description: When priorities change, reassign workers and tasks instantly from the dashboard. No phone calls needed.

steps.title: Workers Check In
steps.description: Field workers tap to check in when they arrive. GPS coordinates and timestamps are captured automatically.

steps.title: Dashboard Updates Instantly
steps.description: Every check-in, task update, and status change appears on your dashboard in real time via SignalR.

steps.title: Managers Take Action
steps.description: Spot issues, reassign tasks, and make decisions with full situational awareness - all from one screen.

multiSite.title: Multi-Site Operations
multiSite.description: Managing teams across dozens of locations? The Live Dashboard becomes your command centre - see everything at once and drill into any site.

urgentCallouts.title: Urgent Callouts
urgentCallouts.description: When an urgent job comes in, instantly see which workers are nearby and available. Dispatch the right person in seconds, not minutes.

clientReporting.title: Client Transparency
clientReporting.description: Show clients exactly when their service was performed with GPS-verified timestamps and real-time status updates.

meta.title: Task Scheduling & Route Planning | SaberTask
meta.description: Plan, schedule and route every job from one platform. Recurring service agreements, optimised routes and mobile proof of work - built for service teams.

hero.description: Build the work scope once, let SaberTask generate the right tasks on the right day, optimise the route, and run the whole day from a phone - all in one platform.

problem.title: Scheduling Without Spreadsheets
problem.description: Service businesses waste hours every week building schedules in Excel, calling drivers to confirm stops, and rebuilding it all from scratch when something changes.
before: Recurring jobs rebuilt by hand every week
Routes drawn on paper, no time or distance estimates
Field workers calling the office for the next stop
Photo proof and signatures collected on a separate app
after: Service agreements generate the right tasks automatically
Routes optimised by distance, capacity and working hours
Mobile navigation guides workers stop to stop
Photos, notes and customer signatures captured in-task

capabilities.title: Everything You Need to Run the Day
capabilities.description: Work descriptions, weekly plans, recurring tasks, optimised routes, mobile navigation and on-site proof of work - all in one connected flow.

workDescriptions.title: Structured Work Descriptions
workDescriptions.description: Define areas, frequencies and checklist items per location. Reuse a shared task library so the scope stays consistent across customers.

weeklyPlans.title: Weekly Plans by Team
weeklyPlans.description: Build a 7-column plan per team with drag-and-drop entries, live hours and revenue totals, and Draft → Active lifecycle.

recurring.title: Recurring Task Generation
recurring.description: Eight scheduling frequencies - weekly, even, odd, monthly 1st-4th, custom - with optional seasonal date ranges. Generated automatically.

routeOptimisation.title: Smart Route Optimisation
routeOptimisation.description: Drafts respect distance, daily working hours, capacity and time estimates. Re-optimise on demand and confirm to publish.

mobileNavigation.title: Mobile Route Navigation
mobileNavigation.description: Workers see today's stops in optimised order, start turn-by-turn navigation, and run the whole day from a single screen.

proofOfWork.title: On-Site Proof of Work
proofOfWork.description: Check-in with GPS, capture photos and notes, get a customer signature on the phone, and mark the task complete.

howItWorks.title: From Plan to Proof in 3 Steps

steps.title: Define the Work Once
steps.description: Build the work description for each location - areas, frequencies and checklist items - in the Work Description Builder.

steps.title: Plan and Auto-Generate
steps.description: Drop the work into a weekly plan per team. Recurring tasks land automatically on the right day, every week.

steps.title: Run the Day on Mobile
steps.description: Workers open the app, follow the optimised route, capture proof of work, and mark each task complete on site.

recurringContracts.title: Recurring Service Contracts
recurringContracts.description: Cleaning, landscaping or facility contracts running every week of the year - generated automatically from the agreement.

multiTeam.title: Multi-Team Field Operations
multiTeam.description: Balance hours and revenue across teams with the planning grid, then dispatch each team's day to their phones.

piecework.title: Piece-Rate (Akkord) Crews
piecework.description: Faktor-minute teams plan their day around piece-rate work, with live earnings visible to workers as tasks are completed.

spotlight.description: The Work Description Builder lets you structure every service - areas, frequencies, checklists - for each location. Build it manually or upload a contract and let AI extract the scope for you.

0.title: Areas, frequencies & checklists
0.description: Break each location into work areas (e.g. Lobby, Kitchen, Stairway). Set how often each area is serviced - weekly, even/odd weeks, monthly or seasonal - and attach checklist items workers must complete.

1.title: AI-powered document import

meta.title: Invoicing & Billing Automation | SaberTask

problem.title: Stop Retyping What You Already Did
problem.description: Service businesses do the work, then re-enter it all into a billing tool. Auto-invoice on task finish makes that double-entry disappear.
before: Completed work retyped into a separate billing tool
Jobs slip through and never get billed
No audit trail of who changed what on an invoice
Sent invoices accidentally edited after the fact
after: Auto-invoice on task finish drops lines straight onto invoices
Status state machine and bulk actions for billing day speed
Per-invoice audit timeline, on by default for every tenant
Sent invoices are immutable - revert to draft to make changes

capabilities.title: Built for Real Billing Days

lineItems.title: Drag-to-Reorder Lines

statusFlow.title: Status State Machine
statusFlow.description: Draft → Sent → Archived with revert and un-archive - sent invoices are immutable so figures can never drift.

csvExport.title: One-Click CSV Export
csvExport.description: Export the selection or the whole filtered list as a CSV ready for any accounting or ERP system - no email round-trip.

auditTrail.title: Per-Invoice Audit Timeline
auditTrail.description: Every status change, header edit and line edit is timestamped and named, on by default, for every tenant.

steps.title: Work Becomes Lines
steps.description: Configure auto-invoice for the services you bill, and completed tasks land in Draft as ready-to-edit invoice lines.

steps.title: Review & Send
steps.description: Open the draft, drag lines into order, adjust if needed, and send - the figures are locked the moment it leaves Draft.

steps.title: Export & Audit
steps.description: Bulk-export invoices to CSV for your accounting system and rely on the per-invoice audit timeline to answer "who changed what".

meta.description: Software built for facility managers. Service agreements, maintenance scheduling, supplier management, photo proof, customer dashboard and mobile app.

hero.description: Manage every building, service agreement, maintenance task and supplier from one platform - and give your owners, tenants and stakeholders their own customer dashboard. Built for facility managers who run dozens to hundreds of buildings.
hero.trial: 30-day free trial · No credit card needed

problems.title: Facility operations without the chaos
problems.description: Service agreements scattered across spreadsheets, maintenance jobs lost in email threads, suppliers calling at random, and tenants demanding updates. SaberTask gives you one structured system for the whole portfolio.

items.problem: Service agreements scattered across files
items.solution: Every contract, location and frequency in one structured database

items.problem: Maintenance tasks lost in email threads
items.solution: Tasks generated from agreements, tracked from assignment to sign-off

items.problem: No way to prove work was done at a building
items.solution: GPS-stamped photos and quality reports per task

items.problem: Tenants and owners constantly chasing for updates
items.solution: Customer dashboard with live KPIs, photo reports and history

buildingDatabase.title: Every building, every contract, every document - searchable
buildingDatabase.description: Owners, buildings, locations, contacts, service agreements and documents in one structured database. Files are AI-searchable so you can find any contract, certificate or specification instantly. Every change is logged for audit and compliance.

serviceAgreements.title: Service agreements that schedule themselves
serviceAgreements.description: Define every recurring service for each building - weekly cleaning, biweekly garden work, quarterly inspections, annual boiler service. SaberTask generates the right tasks on the right day, year after year, and reminds you well before agreements expire. Never miss an obligation again.

photoProof.title: Photo proof on every site visit
photoProof.description: Operations staff and external suppliers document every visit with GPS-tagged, timestamped photos and configurable checklists. When an owner asks "has the stairway been cleaned this week?", the answer is a photo. When something needs repair, document it on the spot - with the next maintenance task generated automatically.

customerDashboard.title: A customer dashboard your owners and tenants will actually use
customerDashboard.description: Give every owner, board member and tenant their own branded customer dashboard - with real-time KPIs, recent activity, photo reports and upcoming service for the buildings they care about. Trust without effort, and a major reason customers stick with you instead of switching administrators.
customerDashboard.learnMore: Learn more about the customer dashboard
bullets: Live KPIs: tasks completed, open issues, satisfaction score
Full service history with photos, timestamps and signatures
Self-service requests and feedback go straight into your task list
Branded with your logo, colours and domain

suppliers.title: In-house teams and external suppliers - same system
suppliers.description: Whether the work is done by your own ejendomsservice team, a contracted cleaning company or a one-off plumber, every party uses the same platform. Assign tasks, track progress, see photos, approve invoices - full visibility across in-house and outsourced operations.

moreCapabilities.title: Built for the whole facility operation
moreCapabilities.description: From the office to the basement - one platform for everything that keeps your buildings running.

items.title: Mobile App for Field Staff
items.description: iOS and Android app with daily task list, GPS clock in/out, photo capture, messaging and live earnings - for in-house staff and suppliers alike.

items.title: Live Dashboard
items.description: See every building, every task, every team in real time on a live map. React instantly to delays or urgent callouts.

items.title: Invoicing & Billing
items.description: Auto-invoice from completed work. Export to Dinero, e-conomic, Dynamics NAV, QuickBooks or as OIOXML for public-sector clients.

items.title: Work Description Builder
items.description: Structure every service per building - areas, frequencies, checklists. Or upload an existing contract PDF and let AI extract the scope.

items.title: Built-in Messaging
items.description: Direct, group and team chat between office, field staff and suppliers. No more separate WhatsApp groups for each building.

items.title: Audit Trail & Compliance
items.description: Every change, clock event, photo and document is logged. GDPR-compliant, multi-tenant isolated and audit-ready by default.

meta.title: Winter Services Software - SnowManager | SaberTask
meta.description: SnowManager by SaberTask: live dispatch, smart route building, service zone drawing, customer dashboard and driver app - trusted by 500+ snow contractors.

hero.description: Snow removal, salting, gritting and de-icing - when the weather hits, every minute counts. SaberTask's purpose-built winter module SnowManager gives you live dispatch, route optimisation, weather triggers and instant proof of service for every customer.
hero.heroCardDescription: Trusted by 500+ snow removal contractors across Scandinavia and beyond.

problems.title: When the snow falls, chaos starts
problems.description: Calls flood in at 4am, drivers need routes immediately, customers want to know when you're coming, and managers have no idea what's actually happening on the ground. SaberTask gives you control over the whole season.

items.problem: No visibility into what crews are doing
items.solution: Live dashboard with GPS tracking and check-ins

items.problem: Routes built by hand at 3am
items.solution: Smart route builder optimises by location and priority

items.problem: Customers calling for status updates
items.solution: Customer dashboard with live service history and ETAs

items.problem: Disputes over whether the work was done
items.solution: GPS-stamped photos and timestamped proof on every visit

liveDispatch.title: Live dispatch - your control center for the storm
liveDispatch.description: See every truck, every route, every check-in in real time on a live map. When a driver is delayed or a customer adds a property, reassign jobs instantly. No more blind trust - just live visibility.

smartRoutes.title: Smart routes built in seconds, not at 3am
smartRoutes.description: Tell SaberTask which properties are P1 (hospitals, schools), P2 (offices, retail) and P3 (residential). When the storm hits, optimised routes are built automatically - by location, priority, equipment and crew. Drivers get them on the phone the moment they wake up.
smartRoutes.mockupImageAlt: Optimised snow route across Copenhagen Østerbro with 26 stops totalling 7 km

drawingTool.title: Drawing tool - define exactly what to clear
drawingTool.description: Draw service areas with precision on a map - driveways, walkways, parking lots, loading docks, fire lanes. Workers see the exact zones to clear on their phone, with notes and special instructions per area. No more "did you miss the back lot?" calls.
drawingTool.mockupTitle: Service Areas · Drawn on a satellite map
drawingTool.mockupImageAlt: Drawing tool with service zones marked on a satellite map

customerDashboard.title: A customer dashboard your clients will love
customerDashboard.description: Property managers and facility owners log in to see every visit, every photo, every salt application - with timestamps and the truck that did the work. No more morning calls asking "were you here last night?". Trust without effort, and a major reason customers stay loyal.

subcontractors.title: Subcontractors and invoicing - handled
subcontractors.description: Manage your network of subcontractors in the same system as your in-house crews. Assign jobs, track performance, approve their work and process payments. Then auto-invoice clients based on completed visits - exported to your accounting system in one click.

snowmanager.title: SnowManager - the dedicated brand for snow contractors
snowmanager.description: SnowManager is SaberTask's purpose-built winter module, used by 500+ snow removal contractors. Same platform, same mobile app, same accounting integrations - branded specifically for the snow industry with its own dedicated site, support and community.

moreCapabilities.title: Everything else you need for the season
moreCapabilities.description: From the office to the cab to the customer - one platform for the whole winter operation.

items.title: Mobile App for Drivers
items.description: iOS and Android app with daily route, GPS clock in/out, photo capture and messaging - built for drivers wearing gloves at 3am.

items.title: Photo Documentation
items.description: Before/after photos with GPS and timestamp on every visit. End disputes about whether the work was done.

items.title: Property Database
items.description: Every customer, location, contact and contract in one searchable place. Drawn service areas, special instructions, gate codes - all there.

items.title: Driver Management
items.description: Shifts, rostering, sick leave, payroll and accord/piece-rate work - manage your seasonal crew alongside your year-round staff.

items.title: Built-in Messaging
items.description: Direct, group and team chat between dispatch, drivers and subcontractors. Critical when the storm hits and information needs to move fast.

items.title: Audit Trail
items.description: Every clock event, photo, route and approval is logged. GDPR-compliant and ready for any insurance dispute or contract audit.

taskScreen.createNewTask: Create new task at this location

invoiceFlow.description: Work gets done, invoices get created. No re-typing, no copy-paste, no missed billable tasks.

workDescription.subtitle: Work Description Builder
workDescription.notesValue: 19 main stairways. Dust in winter f...

mobileApp.taskDetailDesc: Tap a task to see the full picture - address with one-tap navigation, work description, customer notes, photo history and a notes field. Capture before-and-after photos, write comments and finalize the job - all without leaving the screen.
mobileApp.salaryDesc: No more waiting until pay day to find out what you made. The Salary screen shows gross hours, break deductions, net pay and piecework (accord) earnings updating in real time as you clock in and out. Approved and pending amounts are separated so there are never surprises.
mobileApp.capabilitiesTitle: Built for people who work on their feet
mobileApp.capabilitiesSubtitle: Big buttons, fast load times and zero training required.
mobileApp.gpsDesc: One-tap clock in and out with automatic GPS capture. Break rules deduct pauses per shift type so the timesheet is always accurate.
mobileApp.photoDesc: Capture before-and-after photos attached directly to each task. GPS-tagged, timestamped and synced to the web dashboard automatically.
mobileApp.taskListDesc: Tasks for the day are organised in the optimal order based on your route plan. See what's next, tap to navigate, and work through the day efficiently.
mobileApp.messagingDesc: Direct, group and team chat with file attachments, unread counts and read receipts. No need for a separate WhatsApp group.
mobileApp.sickLeaveDesc: Workers report sick from the phone in one tap. Shifts are converted automatically and managers see live analytics instantly.
mobileApp.elearningDesc: Assign training courses directly in the app. Workers complete modules, watch videos and pass quizzes - all tracked so you know who is certified and who needs a refresher.
mobileApp.connectedTitle: Connected to everything on the web
mobileApp.connectedSubtitle: Every action on the phone shows up instantly on the web dashboard - and vice versa.
